decisions.description: delay the API launch by two weeks
optimize the database queries before scaling up
decisions.context: to address cloud costs going over budget

action_items.what: coordinate with the DevOps team to set up the staging environment

sentiment.summary: The meeting tone was professional and collaborative, with team members discussing and assigning tasks. The team appeared to be on the same page, with no signs of conflict or strong emotions. The discussion focused on the API launch timeline, documentation, and cost optimization.

speaker_sentiments.speaker: John
speaker_sentiments.notes: Facilitated the discussion and assigned tasks in a neutral and objective tone.

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Sarah
speaker_sentiments.notes: Raised concerns and discussed tasks in a professional and collaborative manner.

speaker_sentiments.speaker: Mike
speaker_sentiments.notes: Agreed with decisions and accepted tasks in a positive and cooperative tone.
